title: Attestplane forbidden-fields v1 (advisory list)
description: DRAFT — proposed under ADR-0009 (Phase 1 P1.1). Authoritative list of payload field names whose presence in an `AuditEvent.payload` constitutes a redaction-policy violation per ADR-0004 § 2 column-3 and the claim-safety triad in docs/policy/. The list is **advisory at the SDK boundary**: Attestplane substrate does NOT scan payload bytes for these terms at append() time. Enforcement is the caller's responsibility, typically inside `GenericRuntimeAdapter.translate()` per ADR-0004 § 4. Verifiers and auditor-export builders may consult this file to flag bundles that contain any of these field names at the payload root.

version.description: Frozen at 1 for v1. Independent of chain.schema_version / anchor_schema_version / signature_schema_version. Bump requires an ADR amendment.

items.description: Lowercase snake_case payload field name. Substring matching is NOT specified — verifiers MUST match exact root-level keys, not nested or substring.

rationale_url.description: Stable URL pointing to ADR-0004 § 2 column-3 + ADR-0009 § 1 (the redaction-policy rationale).

applies_to.description: Which artefact kinds this advisory list applies to. Omit for substrate-wide application.
